<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Patch project-level repository credentials"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"patch"}
  path={"/v1beta1/projects/{project}/repo-credentials/{repo-credentials}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Patch project-level repository credentials. Only provided fields
are updated. Returns a heavily redacted Kubernetes Secret resource.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
